name: Weighted Decision Matrix
what_it_is: Choosing between options by scoring each against importance-weighted criteria.
core_mechanic: Options as columns, criteria as rows. Assign weights (1-5). Score options per criterion (1-5). Multiply and sum. The weighting process reveals what you actually value.
when_to_use: Multiple viable options and choice isn't obvious / Different stakeholders value different things / Need to stress-test an intuition
when_not_to_use: Only one real option (that's justification) / Primarily values-based decision / Time-critical decisions
ideaos_application: Agent 3 builds the matrix, proposes 4-6 criteria, scores options, and flags which criterion re-weighting would flip the decision.
